title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo is a **CLI-first + Electron desktop** TypeScript code agent framework, with a layered architecture: input routing → command dispatch / agent execution → LLM provider adapters → tool calls → SQLite persistence, plus built-in Pepe semantic memory (embedding vectors + retrieval + ranking). Core modules live under `src/` (agent, commands, desktop, memory, providers, sessions, tools).
